DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY (INCORRECTLY NAMED AS "FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE CO.") All claims raised in the First Amended Complaint against defendant Fidelity National Title Company are dismissed, and judgment is for defendant and against plaintiff as to all of those claims.
